description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:8 Docker image and defines two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a build job that runs "npm install", caches the node_modules/ directory, and saves node_modules/ as an artifact that expires in 1 week, with the job tagged docker and shared. In the test stage add a test job that runs "npm test" using the same node:8 image and also carries the docker and shared tags. No additional services, rules, or deployment targets are required.
